rs4986893.description: CYP2C19*3 — loss-of-function variant (636G>A, premature stop codon)

phenotype_to_guidance.Normal Metabolizer: Standard clopidogrel dosing. No dose adjustment needed based on CYP2C19 genotype.
phenotype_to_guidance.Intermediate Metabolizer: Reduced clopidogrel activation expected. Consider alternative antiplatelet therapy (e.g., prasugrel or ticagrelor) if clinically indicated, per CPIC guidelines.
phenotype_to_guidance.Poor Metabolizer: Significantly reduced clopidogrel activation. CPIC recommends an alternative antiplatelet agent (prasugrel or ticagrelor) due to increased risk of adverse cardiovascular events.
phenotype_to_guidance.Rapid Metabolizer: Enhanced clopidogrel activation. Standard dosing is appropriate. May have increased bleeding risk at higher doses.
phenotype_to_guidance.Ultra-rapid Metabolizer: Enhanced clopidogrel activation. Standard dosing is appropriate. Monitor for increased bleeding risk.
